We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 3.11s, d = 32.4m:
t^2 = 3.11 * 3.11:
3.11 * 0.01 = 0.0311
3.11 * 0.10 = 0.3110
3.11 * 3.00 = 9.3300
0.0311 + 0.3110 = 0.3421
0.3421 + 9.3300 = 9.6721
k = 32.4 / 3.11^2 = 32.4 / 9.6721 = 32.400 / 9.672
= 0 + 1 * 32400 / 9672
= 1 + 1 * 22728 / 9672
= 2 + 1 * 13056 / 9672
= 3 + 1 * 3384 / 9672
= 3.0 + 0.1 * 33840 / 9672
= 3.1 + 0.1 * 24168 / 9672
= 3.2 + 0.1 * 14496 / 9672
= 3.3 + 0.1 * 4824 / 9672
= 3.30 + 0.01 * 48240 / 9672
= 3.31 + 0.01 * 38568 / 9672
= 3.32 + 0.01 * 28896 / 9672
= 3.33 + 0.01 * 19224 / 9672
= 3.34 + 0.01 * 9552 / 9672
= 3.340 + 0.001 * 95520 / 9672
= 3.341 + 0.001 * 85848 / 9672
= 3.342 + 0.001 * 76176 / 9672
= 3.343 + 0.001 * 66504 / 9672
= 3.344 + 0.001 * 56832 / 9672
= 3.345 + 0.001 * 47160 / 9672
= 3.346 + 0.001 * 37488 / 9672
= 3.347 + 0.001 * 27816 / 9672
= 3.348 + 0.001 * 18144 / 9672
= 3.349 + 0.001 * 8472 / 9672
= 3.349

t = 2.33s, d = 18.18m:
t^2 = 2.33 * 2.33:
2.33 * 0.03 = 0.0699
2.33 * 0.30 = 0.6990
2.33 * 2.00 = 4.6600
0.0699 + 0.6990 = 0.7689
0.7689 + 4.6600 = 5.4289
k = 18.18 / 2.33^2 = 18.18 / 5.4289 = 18.180 / 5.428
= 0 + 1 * 18180 / 5428
= 1 + 1 * 12752 / 5428
= 2 + 1 * 7324 / 5428
= 3 + 1 * 1896 / 5428
= 3.0 + 0.1 * 18960 / 5428
= 3.1 + 0.1 * 13532 / 5428
= 3.2 + 0.1 * 8104 / 5428
= 3.3 + 0.1 * 2676 / 5428
= 3.30 + 0.01 * 26760 / 5428
= 3.31 + 0.01 * 21332 / 5428
= 3.32 + 0.01 * 15904 / 5428
= 3.33 + 0.01 * 10476 / 5428
= 3.34 + 0.01 * 5048 / 5428
= 3.340 + 0.001 * 50480 / 5428
= 3.341 + 0.001 * 45052 / 5428
= 3.342 + 0.001 * 39624 / 5428
= 3.343 + 0.001 * 34196 / 5428
= 3.344 + 0.001 * 28768 / 5428
= 3.345 + 0.001 * 23340 / 5428
= 3.346 + 0.001 * 17912 / 5428
= 3.347 + 0.001 * 12484 / 5428
= 3.348 + 0.001 * 7056 / 5428
= 3.349 + 0.001 * 1628 / 5428
= 3.349

t = 3.93s, d = 51.73m:
t^2 = 3.93 * 3.93:
3.93 * 0.03 = 0.1179
3.93 * 0.90 = 3.5370
3.93 * 3.00 = 11.7900
0.1179 + 3.5370 = 3.6549
3.6549 + 11.7900 = 15.4449
k = 51.73 / 3.93^2 = 51.73 / 15.4449 = 51.730 / 15.444
= 0 + 1 * 51730 / 15444
= 1 + 1 * 36286 / 15444

t = 2.23s, d = 16.66m:
t^2 = 2.23 * 2.23:
2.23 * 0.03 = 0.0669
2.23 * 0.20 = 0.4460
2.23 * 2.00 = 4.4600
0.0669 + 0.4460 = 0.5129
0.5129 + 4.4600 = 4.9729
k = 16.66 / 2.23^2 = 16.66 / 4.9729 = 16.660 / 4.972
= 0 + 1 * 16660 / 4972
= 1 + 1 * 11688 / 4972
= 2 + 1 * 6716 / 4972
= 3 + 1 * 1744 / 4972
= 3.0 + 0.1 * 17440 / 4972
= 3.1 + 0.1 * 12468 / 4972
= 3.2 + 0.1 * 7496 / 4972
= 3.3 + 0.1 * 2524 / 4972
= 3.30 + 0.01 * 25240 / 4972
= 3.31 + 0.01 * 20268 / 4972
= 3.32 + 0.01 * 15296 / 4972
= 3.33 + 0.01 * 10324 / 4972
= 3.34 + 0.01 * 5352 / 4972
= 3.35 + 0.01 * 380 / 4972
= 3.350 + 0.001 * 3800 / 4972
= 3.350

k values: 3.349, 3.349, 3.349, 3.350
k values (sorted): 3.349, 3.349, 3.349, 3.350
The median k is 3.349.

For t = 2.82:
t^2 = 2.82 * 2.82:
2.82 * 0.02 = 0.0564
2.82 * 0.80 = 2.2560
2.82 * 2.00 = 5.6400
0.0564 + 2.2560 = 2.3124
2.3124 + 5.6400 = 7.9524
= 7.9524

d = 3.349 * 7.9524:
3.349 * 0.0004 = 0.0013396
3.349 * 0.0020 = 0.0066980
3.349 * 0.0500 = 0.1674500
3.349 * 0.9000 = 3.0141000
3.349 * 7.0000 = 23.4430000
0.0013396 + 0.0066980 = 0.0080376
0.0080376 + 0.1674500 = 0.1754876
0.1754876 + 3.0141000 = 3.1895876
3.1895876 + 23.4430000 = 26.6325876
= 26.632

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{26.632}
